name: Louisiana Office for Citizens with Developmental Disabilities (OCDD)
description: State agency administering services for individuals with developmental disabilities including waiver programs, support coordination, and community-based services.

name: Louisiana Early Intervention (EarlySteps)
description: Part C early intervention program providing developmental services for infants and toddlers birth to age 3 with developmental delays or disabilities.

name: The Arc of Louisiana
description: Statewide nonprofit advocacy organization for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities providing resources and community support.

name: Special Olympics Louisiana
description: Year-round sports training and competition for children and adults with intellectual disabilities throughout Louisiana.

name: Disability Rights Louisiana (The Advocacy Center)
description: Federally designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal advocacy and rights protection for Louisianans with disabilities.

name: Louisiana Lifespan Respite Care Program
description: Respite care resources and referral services for family caregivers of individuals with disabilities or chronic health conditions.

name: MedCamps of Louisiana
description: Summer and weekend camp programs for children with disabilities and special medical needs at no cost to families.

name: Louisiana Assistive Technology Access Network (LATAN)
description: Louisiana's assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, equipment loans, and AT solutions for individuals with disabilities.

name: Louisiana ABLE Account
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts for individuals with disabilities enabling savings without affecting public benefits eligibility.

name: Louisiana Medicaid Waiver Programs (ROW / NOW)
description: Home and community-based Medicaid waiver programs (Residential Options Waiver and New Opportunities Waiver) for individuals with developmental disabilities.

name: JET Paratransit (New Orleans RTA)
description: Paratransit transportation service for individuals with disabilities in the New Orleans area who are unable to use fixed-route transit.

name: Louisiana Housing Corporation - Accessible Housing
description: State housing authority providing accessible and affordable housing resources for individuals with disabilities throughout Louisiana.

name: Children's Hospital New Orleans - Developmental Pediatrics
description: Developmental and behavioral pediatrics providing comprehensive evaluations and treatment for children with developmental concerns.

name: Easter Seals Louisiana Pediatric Therapy
description: Pediatric therapy services including physical, occupational, and speech therapy for children with disabilities.

name: Louisiana Rehabilitation Services (LRS) - Employment
description: State vocational rehabilitation program providing job training, placement, and employment support for Louisianans with disabilities.
